ὁμολόγησις, ήσεως, ἡ (ὁμολογέω; Diod S 17, 68, 4) act of professing allegiance, confessing (opp. ἄρνησις) Hs 9, 28, 7.—TW.

Diod S Diod S , I b.c.—List 5

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

Hs Hs = Similitudes
